Jordan stands as
an example of the
transformative
qualities of ambition
and hard work. In
that regard, he
is a motivator
without peer. I’ve
known Jordan for
two years and
I’ve been in his
company many
times but there
is nothing quite
like his public
speaking.
—Leonardo
DiCaprio
‘‘
‘‘
The
Inner Game
of
Wealth
Creation

advice. I’ve taken every effort to ensure we accurately represent these strategies
and their potential to help you grow your business. However, I do not purport this as
a “get rich scheme” and there is no guarantee that you will earn any money using
the content, strategies or techniques displayed here. Nothing in this presentation is
a promise or guarantee of earnings. Your level of success in attaining similar results
is dependent upon a number of factors including your skill, knowledge, ability,
connections, dedication, business savvy, business focus, business goals, and financial
situation. Because these factors differ according to individuals, I cannot guarantee
your success, income level, or ability to earn revenue. You alone are responsible for
your actions and results in life and business, and by your use of these materials, you
agree not to attempt to hold us liable for any of your decisions, actions or results, at
any time, under any circumstance. Any forward-looking statements outlined here are
simply our expectations or forecasts for future potential, and thus are not guarantees
or promises for actual performance. These statements are simply my opinion. The
information contained herein cannot replace or substitute for the services of trained
professionals in any field, including, but not limited to, financial or legal matters.
Under no circumstances, including but not limited to negligence, will Jordan Belfort,
Global Motivation, Inc. or any of their representatives or contractors be liable for any
special or consequential damages that result from the use of, or the inability to use,

of such damages.

-- 2 of 24 --

1
WELCOME
Congratulations on taking this important step in understanding the
real path to lasting wealth.
The road upon which you are about to embark showcases the
ultimate path to financial freedom. It is based on a collection of skills,
strategies, and experiences that I have practiced and honed over
many businesses, investments, and growth opportunities. These
are the fundamental skills that have enabled me to create and then
re-create my own financial success, and I’m excited to share them
with you.
Although you will learn in-depth systems and strategies at the
Straight Line Training Event, this Inner Game DVD program is
designed to give you a jump start into the mindset and principles
upon which my techniques are based.
Portions of my journey have been both humbling and exhilarating,
and it is my greatest hope that you will be able to benefit from
my successes and simultaneously learn from my mistakes in order
to create an ongoing space for your own real and lasting
abundance—not just financially, but in all other areas of your
life, as well.
In gratitude,
Jordan Belfort
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 24 --

2
THE STORY
In the 1990s, Jordan Belfort built one of the most dynamic and
successful sales organizations in Wall Street history. During that time,
he soared to the highest financial heights, earning over $500 million a
year, a feat that coined him the name “The Wolf of Wall Street.”
As the owner of Stratton Oakmont, Belfort employed over 1,000
stockbrokers and raised over $1 billion to start up more than thirty
million-dollar companies from scratch. Taking over many of them
when they ran into trouble, he then turned them around and sold
them for massive sums of money.
Along the way, he succumbed to some of the traps of the high-flying
lifestyle, going through a spectacular—and well-publicized—fall from
grace. Taking invaluable lessons from the mistakes he made and the
prices he paid, he has re-emerged as a globally recognized potent
force behind extraordinary business success.
Today, his proprietary Straight Line System allows him to take virtually
any individual, regardless of age, race, sex, educational background
or social status, and empower them to create massive wealth,
abundance, and entrepreneurial success, without sacrificing integrity
or ethics.
Jordan’s top two international bestselling memoirs, “The Wolf of Wall
Street” and “Catching the Wolf of Wall Street” have been published
in over forty countries and translated into eighteen languages. His
life story is currently being turned into a major motion picture with
Leonardo DiCaprio to star and Martin Scorsese set to direct.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

5
FOUR SECRETS TO
ULTIMATE SUCCESS

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 24 --

6
TWO ROADS TO
ULTIMATE FAILURE
1. Choose Your Values Wisely
2. Prioritize Your Values
YOU HAVE TO GET TO THE POINT WHERE
YOU WANT TO CHANGE.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 24 --

7
SUCCESS: #1
OWN YOUR STATE
YOUR BODY.
Use the motion of your body to release the emotion in your
true spirit.
Act as if you have already achieved what you desire... embody
this image and walk your vision.
YOUR MIND.
Lock your focus on that which you truly desire.
You MUST condition yourself to not look at the problem, only
the solution.
THERE ARE 6,000 EMOTIONS, BUT WE ONLY FEEL 10-12 ON
AN AVERAGE DAY AND HALF OF THEM ARE NEGATIVE.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 24 --

8
SUCCESS: #2 CRACK
DESTRUCTIVE BELIEFS
We all have global beliefs about ourselves and the world
around us.
And, as we continually grow and expand, our brains are
constantly creating meanings and interpretations of the world
around us.
These interpretations evolve into references that support
ideas... and a BELIEF is an idea about which you become
completely certain. Thus, the only way to transform a belief or
mindset that may be holding you back is to crack the legs upon
which it stands.
THERE ARE NO SUCH THINGS AS LIMITS TO GROWTH,
BECAUSE THERE ARE NO LIMITS TO THE HUMAN CAPACITY
FOR INTELLIGENCE, IMAGINATION, AND WONDER.
—RONALD REAGAN
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 24 --

DISEMPOWERING BELIEF
____________________________________________
____________________________________________
____________________________________________
What has this belief COST you?
1.
2.
3.
What will this belief cost you in the FUTURE if you continue to
hold onto it?
1.
2.
3.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 24 --

10
SUCCESS: #3 DEVELOP
UNSTOPPABLE STRATEGIES
First, KNOW your outcome.
Then, model someone who has accomplished that which you
seek to achieve.
But, here’s the key: DON’T MODEL THE WHOLE PERSON. Pick
out the traits that you want to emulate and formulate your OWN
success strategy using the characteristics you admire.
4 Keys to Unstoppable Strategies
1. Have a really clear knowledge of what you want.
2. Take massive action.
3. Analyze your results.
4. Change your plan if it isn’t working.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 24 --

11
SUCCESS: #4 ELEVATE
YOUR STANDARDS
Your standards are the absolute “MUSTS” in your life. And, we
always get what we MUST have.
Real strategies are otherwise known as ETHICS...
Ultimately, what really matters is doing the right thing.
IF YOU WANT TO CHANGE YOUR LIFE,
CHANGE YOUR STANDARDS.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 24 --

12
FAILURE: #1 CHOOSE
YOUR VALUES WISELY
Your values dictate the legacy of your life.
It’s a simple equation...
Poor Values = DESTRUCTION.
High Standard, Empowering Values = ABUNDANCE &
TRUE FULFILLMENT.
ALL THAT IS NECESSARY FOR THE TRIUMPH OF EVIL
IS THAT GOOD MEN DO NOTHING.
—EDMUND BURKE
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 24 --

13
FAILURE: #2
PRIORITIZE YOUR VALUES
The order of importance for what you value also determines
your life outcome.
The order of Jordan’s DESTRUCTIVE VALUES:
1. Money
2. Power
3. Sex
4. Drugs
5. Spirituality
The order of Jordan’s SUCCESS VALUES:
1. Giving Value to Others
2. Family
3. Love
4. Passion
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 17 of 24 --

16
WHEN YOU STRIP
EVERYTHING ELSE AWAY...
IT’S ALL ABOUT A MAN’S
CHARACTER.
It’s not GREED that is good... it’s AMBITION.
When you only focus on greed, ethics are the first thing to go
out the window.
Yet, when you finally get to the core of what’s important in life...
ethics are all that really matter.
EVERYTHING THAT CAN BE COUNTED DOES NOT
NECESSARILY COUNT; EVERYTHING THAT COUNTS
CANNOT NECESSARILY BE COUNTED.
—ALBERT EINSTEIN
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 18 of 24 --

17
A QUICK NOTE
ON MENTORS
The people in my life have greatly impacted both my path to
destruction and my road to success. Choose your mentors and
the people with whom you surround yourself very carefully.
This alone can be the difference between a life of pain and a
life of lasting luxury.
The 3 Most Important Things to Look for in a Mentor
1. Has this person done it him/herself?
2. Has this person successfully mentored others?
3. Will it work for me?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

3.

2.

-- 20 of 24 --

19
7 THINGS THAT HOLD
PEOPLE BACK
1.They have goals instead of a vision for life.
2.They don’t follow a proven system.
3.They think that money doesn’t matter.
4.They don’t play life to win.
5.They make decisions slowly and change their
mind quickly.
6.They haven’t chosen a mentor who has
real-world experience.
7.They haven’t taken responsibility for their world.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 21 of 24 --

20
E n t r E p r E n E u r s h i p
Corporate Training, Sales
& Wealth Building Strategies
For over two decades, Jordan Belfort’s Straight Line System has created massive
productivity increases, radically improved sales and marketing effectiveness and
produced extraordinary financial results for thousands of companies worldwide in
every type of business imaginable.
Start your transformation with Jordan’s
Straight Line Persuasion Home Study Course
These invaluable resources will teach you:
• The FOUR elements of the
inner game
• How to gather intelligence and
develop instant rapport
• The art of quick qualifying and
pinpoint prospecting
• The little-known key to high
quality and ethical presentations
• How to instantly squash limiting
buying beliefs and turn skeptics
into buyers
• The Magic Bullet to closing calmly
and consistently every time
• How to use “looping” to turn your prospect’s objections into successful close
• How to create never-ending referral streams and keep your customers for life
Call 800-361-1691 or visit www.jordanbelfort.com
for more information.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 22 of 24 --

21
Experience the Power of
Jordan Belfort’s Live Events
From his introductory programs to his intensive
multi-day events, Jordan Belfort’s live events
are designed for those individuals resolved to do
whatever it takes to create, implement and achieve
their ultimate vision. Drawing upon his powerful
life experiences in the real world, Jordan will take
you through both the inner world psychology as
well as the outer world skills you need to produce a
quantum difference in your life.
Straight Line Corporate Training
Whether you are a start-up company or a global
institution, Jordan will train your team in the Straight
Line System as he applies these strategies specifically
to the dynamics of your organization. In his custom
training session, topics he will cover can include:
• The Four Core Elements of the Inner Game of
Wealth Creation
• The Art of Straight Line Persuasion: Your Most
Valuable Tool in Growing your Business
• Sales Optimization: Seven Steps to Qualifying and
Closing Any Prospect Calmly & Elegantly
• Straight Line Marketing: Creating a Quality,
Effective Marketing Machine
• Secrets for Raising Capital in Any Economy (and the Biggest Mistakes to Avoid)
• Five Steps of Operational Competency
• How to Train, Manage & Motivate Your Team to Produce World Class Performance
Using his signature direct, humorous and passionate style, Jordan will train your
team in the most powerful Business System ever devised.
Call 800-361-1691 or visit www.jordanbelfort.com
To inquire about a private corporate event: email support@jordanbelfortglobal.com
and ask to speak to a corporate training representative.
Entrepreneur, Author,
Business Strategist

Camp was absolutely
brilliant! Less than 24
hours after leaving you,
I used your system,
adjusted my tonality and
have raised $5 million
in venture capital from 1
individual. Thank you!”
—Sam Elbanna
Melbourne, Australia
